---
title: "Welcome"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: article
---

A structured, project-based path from Python fundamentals to production-ready
data science and MLOps - software engineering standards applied to the full
data science lifecycle, following [CRISP-DM](https://medium.com/@shawn.chumbar/the-crisp-dm-process-a-comprehensive-guide-4d893aecb151)
from business understanding to deployment.

<div style='background:#F4F5F6;border-left:5px solid #6B7280;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:6px;margin:24px 0'>
<span style='color:#6B7280;font-weight:bold'><i class="bi bi-compass-fill"></i> How this book works</span><br><br>
Every chapter is a Jupyter notebook meant to be run top to bottom, not just read.
Along the way you'll see four recurring markers:
<ul>
<li><i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill" style="color:#0369A1"></i> <b>Key Concept</b> - the core idea, precisely defined</li>
<li><i class="bi bi-puzzle-fill" style="color:#EA580C"></i> <b>Activity</b> - a hands-on challenge with a stated goal, expected output, and a hint. Fill in the <code>...</code> placeholders yourself before moving on</li>
<li><i class="bi bi-bug-fill" style="color:#DC2626"></i> <b>Common Mistake</b> - a bug pattern worth recognising on sight</li>
<li><i class="bi bi-lightbulb-fill" style="color:#6B7280"></i> <b>Pro Tip</b> - a production-grade habit</li>
</ul>
</div>

## What's inside

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div style='border:1px solid #DEE2E6;border-radius:8px;padding:18px 20px;height:100%'>
<span style='background:#EAF7F0;color:#059669;font-weight:bold;font-size:0.75em;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px'>COMPLETE</span>

### Part 1 - Python Basics

Language core, control flow, professional patterns, NumPy, and data visualisation.

- [01 - Python Core](tutorials/01-python-basics/01-python-core.ipynb)
- [02 - Control Flow](tutorials/01-python-basics/02-control-flow.ipynb)
- [03 - Python Patterns](tutorials/01-python-basics/03-python-patterns.ipynb)
- [04 - NumPy](tutorials/01-python-basics/04-numpy.ipynb)
- [05 - Matplotlib and Its Ecosystem](tutorials/01-python-basics/05-matplotlib.ipynb)
- [06 - Grammar of Graphics with Lets-Plot](tutorials/01-python-basics/06-lets-plot.ipynb)
- [07 - Data Storytelling and House Style](tutorials/01-python-basics/07-data-storytelling.ipynb)
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div style='border:1px solid #DEE2E6;border-radius:8px;padding:18px 20px;height:100%;opacity:0.7'>
<span style='background:#FFF1E6;color:#EA580C;font-weight:bold;font-size:0.75em;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px'>IN PROGRESS</span>

### Part 2 - Data Analysis

Pandas, Polars, and exploratory data analysis on real tabular data.

- [01 - Pandas Core](tutorials/03-data-analysis/01-pandas-core.ipynb)
- 02 - Pandas Operations *(coming soon)*
- 03 - Combining and Reshaping Data *(coming soon)*
- 04 - Time Series *(coming soon)*
- 05 - Polars *(coming soon)*
- 06 - EDA in Practice *(coming soon)*
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div style='border:1px solid #DEE2E6;border-radius:8px;padding:18px 20px;height:100%;opacity:0.7'>
<span style='background:#F4F5F6;color:#6B7280;font-weight:bold;font-size:0.75em;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px'>IN PROGRESS</span>

### Part 3 - Dev Tools

Git workflow, `uv`, `ruff`, pre-commit, pytest, and mypy - the tooling every
chapter from here on assumes.
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div style='border:1px solid #DEE2E6;border-radius:8px;padding:18px 20px;height:100%;opacity:0.7'>
<span style='background:#F4F5F6;color:#6B7280;font-weight:bold;font-size:0.75em;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px'>IN PROGRESS</span>

### Part 4 - Classical ML & Deep Learning

Pipelines, hyperparameter tuning, and a first pass at PyTorch.
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div style='border:1px solid #DEE2E6;border-radius:8px;padding:18px 20px;height:100%;opacity:0.7'>
<span style='background:#F4F5F6;color:#6B7280;font-weight:bold;font-size:0.75em;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px'>IN PROGRESS</span>

### Part 5 - MLOps

System design, packaging, CI/CD, and serving a model in production.
</div>
:::

:::

Later parts are added chapter by chapter as each one is finished and reaches
the same standard as Part 1.

## Get started

<a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/01-python-core.ipynb" style="background:#1E293B;color:white;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:bold;display:inline-block;margin-top:8px"><i class="bi bi-play-fill"></i> Start with Part 1</a>

Source code: [github.com/sambaiga/ds-mlops-path](https://github.com/sambaiga/ds-mlops-path)
